close.done.nogates: task {task} closed with a documented EXCEPTION (no gates — install mise for real validation).
close.uninit: this project is not initialized: there is no convention to govern. Run `tramalia init` first.
doctor.fix.pick: select what to install (space marks, enter confirms)
doctor.viamise: installed via mise (shims) — activate with `mise activate` or restart the terminal
menu.title: what do you want to do?
offer.later: you can install it later with: pip install {paquete}
offer.manual: manual: pip install {paquete}  ·  with pipx: pipx inject tramalia-cli {paquete}
tui.audit.empty: no closes recorded yet — close your first task with `tramalia close`.
tui.audit.uninit:
this project is not initialized: there is no audit to show.
Go to Overview and press the Initialize button (or `tramalia init`).
tui.close.done.nogates: [yellow]○ task closed with a documented EXCEPTION (no gates — install mise for real validation)[/yellow]
tui.close.model.placeholder: model used (optional, recorded in the audit)
tui.close.nogates: [yellow]▲ gates NOT run (mise missing) — will be recorded as a documented exception[/yellow]
tui.close.taskinfo.none: that task is not in specs/tasks.md — add it there so the close is traceable.
tui.close.uninit:
this project is not initialized — there is no convention to govern.
Initialize it first:
tui.install.done: [green]✓ mise install finished (check the refreshed table)[/green]
tui.install.nomise:
[yellow]mise is not installed (it's bootstrap: it can't install itself).[/yellow]
Install it for your system and try again:
  Windows:     winget install jdx.mise
  Linux/macOS: curl https://mise.run | sh
  macOS:       brew install mise
tui.install.none: nothing can be installed automatically; check the manual alternatives in the table.
tui.install.title: install missing — space to mark, enter to confirm
tui.state.uninitialized: [yellow]NOT initialized — use the Initialize button or `tramalia init`[/yellow]
tui.subtitle: repo-first governance and evidence
